---
title: statsmodels
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::read_chunk("_knitr.R")
```

******************************************************************************************

http://www.statsmodels.org/stable/index.html

******************************************************************************************
